title: FileVaultBackend
description: Schema describing the behavior and structure of the UML-001 file vault backend. The vault is an append-only, timestamp-rotated log with optional durability guarantees.

base_dir.description: Filesystem directory where active and archived vault files are stored.

active_file.description: Path to the currently active vault file. Format: vault_<unix_timestamp>.log

fsync_on_write.description: If true, each append is made durable using fsync (POSIX) or _commit (Windows).

archive_dir.description: Directory where rotated files are moved. Always base_dir/archive.

filename_format.description: Format of rotated filenames. Matches active file name.

mode.description: Vault files are always opened in append-only mode.

binary_safe.description: Writes are performed in binary-safe mode.

read_behavior.description: Semantics for reading the last line of the active vault file.

returns_null_if_missing.description: If the active file does not exist or is empty, read_last_line returns null.
